providers.name: Local Codex Worker
providers.description: Runs on the Mac and can access local repos, simulators, certs, and file paths.

providers.name: Cloud Codex Worker
providers.description: General cloud worker for planning, coding, and document synthesis.

providers.name: Web Research Worker
providers.description: Research-oriented worker for sourcing, market scans, and public-web lead discovery.

roles.name: Coordinator
roles.description: Owns the brief, splits the work, tracks status, and closes the effort.

roles.name: App Worker
roles.description: Implements repo-scoped product changes in the application codebase.

roles.name: Market Researcher
roles.description: Finds segments, competitor patterns, and market signals with citations.

roles.name: Lead Sourcer
roles.description: Builds raw lead lists with provenance and public contact paths.

roles.name: Reviewer
roles.description: Checks completeness, provenance, duplicates, and handoff quality.

goals.name: Kwipoo app + website release sync
goals.summary: Coordinate release-facing content and cross-repo app and website alignment.

goals.name: Kwipoo B2C market research
goals.summary: Define the first ICP and source reachable public communities and creators.

workers.name: Colin Mac Local
workers.note: Best for repo changes that need local files or simulator access.

workers.name: Cloud Coordinator
workers.note: Owns task routing, artifact checks, and final handoff prep.

workers.name: Research Cloud
workers.note: Use for market scans, competitor pulls, and source logs.

tasks.title: Ready for approval state
tasks.summary: After the "agent" or thread or whatever finishes the task and is ready for a new message or whatever, the task it was working on should have its status changed to like "needs review" or "needs approval", if we have either of those already. if not create one

tasks.title: Demo profiles
tasks.summary: Please start putting together personas and data to use for them to make like dummy/demo profiles

tasks.title: Create draft tasks directly from ideation thread output
tasks.summary: Add a workflow that lets the operator review an ideation thread's suggested tasks and create selected ones as draft tasks with project, summary, and default routing prefilled. Reuse the existing ideation thread/session linkage instead of inventing a second ideation store.

tasks.title: Expose full task routing and governance fields in create/edit flows
tasks.summary: Expand task create/edit flows to support priority, risk level, approval mode, requires review, desired role, goal link, blocked reason, and dependency task selection. Keep the quick-create flow lightweight, but make the detail page a complete editor for the task model.

tasks.title: Add goal-linking workflow for project tasks
tasks.summary: Add a simple goal-linking workflow so tasks can be attached to an existing goal or a new goal from the task/project pages. Surface unlinked-task counts and make it easy to batch-link related tasks after a burst of ideation.

tasks.title: Add project setup health checks and missing-context warnings
tasks.summary: Add a project health panel that flags missing root folder, artifact root, repo path, repo URL, and default branch, and explain which features are degraded by each missing field. If possible, offer a one-click autofill from the local git checkout for repo URL and current branch.

tasks.title: Make runs a first-class surface
tasks.summary: Add a runs index and run detail view with filters for status, task, worker, provider, and time. Show prompt digest, session/thread links, heartbeat age, error summary, and artifact paths so operators can inspect execution outcomes without bouncing between pages.

tasks.title: Reconcile task status automatically from thread/run outcomes
tasks.summary: Add a reconciliation pass that compares task-linked sessions and latest runs, then updates control-plane run/task state or raises an explicit needs-resolution signal when a thread finishes, fails, or becomes unavailable. Prefer non-destructive syncing over silently marking work done.

tasks.title: Surface stale WIP and aging work on home/tasks pages
tasks.summary: Add stale-work indicators based on task updatedAt, last run heartbeat, and thread activity age. Make it visible on the home dashboard and task table, with filters for stale in-progress, no recent run activity, and task has active thread but no recent output.

tasks.title: Add artifact browsing instead of only raw path display
tasks.summary: Add lightweight artifact browsing for task, run, and goal artifact roots, starting with directory listing, file-type badges, and links to known outputs. Keep it read-only at first and reuse existing attachment/download behavior where possible.

tasks.title: Make an assistant that you can run to have it come up with additional useful tasks to create based on the context of your projects and the history of tasks
tasks.summary: Make an assistant that you can run to have it come up with additional useful tasks to create based on the context of your projects and the history of tasks

tasks.title: Do a UI pass to address containers that have text which if the text is long
tasks.summary: Do a UI pass to address containers that have text which if the text is long then it overflows too much or whatever, so like need to elegantly handle varying lengths of text

tasks.title: File attachment for tasks
tasks.summary: Please add the ability to attach files to tasks.

tasks.title: Improve responsiveness
tasks.summary: Improve the responsiveness of the UI, currently for example on the Tasks page if you resize the window, some of the content becomes unviewable unless you widen the window enough

tasks.title: Move project field to top of create task form
tasks.summary: Move project field to top of create task form

tasks.title: Change Running status to In Progress (Tasks)
tasks.summary: Change Running status to In Progress for tasks, also add a "In Draft" status

tasks.title: Reduce size of Thread Continuity in Task detail
tasks.summary: Reduce size of Thread Continuity in Task detail. The Thread preview link cards show too many lines of text if the message is really long. Shouldn't show more than like 5 lines.

tasks.title: Plan for data export
tasks.summary: Please review and analyze for potential options to implement data export for users. Ideally starting out with more basic data export and working up towards a streamline UX for users to export their data. Basically, we want to make it easy for users to take their data with them.

tasks.title: More accurate status indicator on tasks
tasks.summary: Should be able to see if a session/thread is working on a task. make it easy to access the thread from the task detail, and like the task row in the que.

tasks.title: Move adding provider form to button (similar to add project on project page).
tasks.summary: Move adding provider form to button (similar to add project on project page).

tasks.title: Ability to archive threads
tasks.summary: Need the ability to archive threads to like at least filter them out of view in the list of threads in the sessions page. need to be able to multi-select threads and be able to archive multiple at once.

tasks.title: Remove info panels/cards from Providers page
tasks.summary: The info panels/cards feel unnecessary on this page, please remove them

tasks.title: Fix destructive reload
tasks.summary: On some pages and areas of the app, there is intrusive refreshing/reloading to fetch the most recent data. This obviously is poor UX, so need to start fixing the data layer to make it more reactive without interfering with the users activity.

tasks.title: Improve Thread status
tasks.summary: Improve the status reporting of thread activity. Try to make the thread status and activity more realtime, or update the UI to be more indicative of activity occuring - i.e. like animated indicators or whatever would be most appropriate

tasks.title: Refine first Kwipoo ICP
tasks.summary: Turn current product language into a tighter B2C ICP with segment fit signals and objections.
